claim_audit_results.claim_summary: RISK-01: medium likelihood, high impact; modular fallback design, early integration testing from M6
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register[RISK-01]: likelihood:medium, impact:high; mitigation includes modular architecture with fallback modes and 'Begin integration testing from M6, not M18')

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: RISK-07: high likelihood, medium impact; model-agnostic component interfaces
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register[RISK-07]: likelihood:high, impact:medium; mitigation: 'Design all MAESTRO components with model-agnostic interfaces')

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: RISK-04: medium likelihood, high impact; public dataset fallback including MIMIC-IV
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register[RISK-04]: likelihood:medium, impact:high; mitigation explicitly names MIMIC-IV and eICU as public dataset fallback)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: RISK-10: medium likelihood, high impact; M1-M3 API contract definition and bimonthly integration checkpoints
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register[RISK-10]: likelihood:medium, impact:high confirmed; M1-M3 API contract definition confirmed; mitigation states 'Conduct integration checkpoints every 6 months' — contradicts 'bimonthly')
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: Source contradiction on checkpoint frequency: implementation_architecture.json RISK-10 mitigation states 'Conduct integration checkpoints every 6 months'. The section claims 'bimonthly integration checkpoints'. Bimonthly (every 2 months) does not equal every 6 months. The M1-M3 API contract element is confirmed; the checkpoint frequency claim is unsupported by the named source and directly contradicted by it.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Three ethics categories triggered: Category 8 (AI), Category 4 (health data), Category 2 (human participants in medical context)
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (ethics_assessment.issues: ETHICS-01 Category 8 AI, ETHICS-02 Category 4 health data, ETHICS-03 Category 2 human participants)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Ethics oversight by ATU (Ethics Compliance Coordinator) and NIHS (Healthcare Ethics Oversight Officer) through Ethics and Quality Oversight Committee
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (governance_matrix[Ethics and Quality Oversight Committee] composition:[ATU,NIHS]; management_roles[MGR-011] role_name:Ethics Compliance Coordinator, assigned_to:ATU; management_roles[MGR-012] role_name:Healthcare Ethics Oversight Officer, assigned_to:NIHS)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Consortium of eight European organisations covering all three Apply AI sectors mandated by the call (SR-07)
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier2b_topic_and_call_sources/extracted/scope_requirements.json (SR-07: three sectors are healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving); docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase3_wp_design/wp_structure.json (WP5 healthcare, WP6 manufacturing confirmed; WP7 title is Logistics Transfer Demonstrator — logistics is not in-vehicle autonomous driving)
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: SR-07 defines three Apply AI sectors as healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving. MAESTRO covers healthcare (WP5) and advanced manufacturing (WP6). WP7 is a logistics demonstrator, not in-vehicle autonomous driving. gantt.json MS9 references an 'architectural transferability mapping to in-vehicle autonomous driving' but this is a mapping exercise, not a primary demonstrator. The claim that the consortium covers 'all three' sectors is not supported by the Tier 2B source definition of those three sectors.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: ATU (Alpenstadt Technical University, DE, HES): coordinator, WP1+WP2 lead, Chair of AI Foundations expertise in automated planning/LLM-based reasoning/neuro-symbolic AI, contributes to WP3/WP4/WP5/WP6/WP8/WP9
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/partners.json (ATU: legal_name, country:DE, organisation_type:HES, coordinator:true; description confirms Chair of AI Foundations, neuro-symbolic AI, automated planning, LLM-based reasoning); docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase3_wp_design/wp_structure.json (partner_role_matrix[ATU] wps_as_lead:[WP1,WP2]; wps_as_contributor:[WP3,WP4,WP5,WP6,WP8,WP9])

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: CERIA (Centre Européen de Recherche en Informatique Avancée, FR, REC): WP4 lead, formal multi-agent coordination/distributed AI/game-theoretic expertise, contributes to WP2/WP3/WP6/WP7/WP8
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/partners.json (CERIA: legal_name, country:FR, organisation_type:REC; description confirms formal coordination protocols, distributed AI, game-theoretic approaches); docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase3_wp_design/wp_structure.json (WP4 lead_partner:CERIA; partner_role_matrix[CERIA] wps_as_contributor includes WP2,WP3,WP6,WP7,WP8). Derivation: WP6 contribution present in wp_structure.json (Tier 4) but absent from docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/roles.json (Tier 3: CERIA wp_participant:[WP2,WP3,WP7,WP8], no WP6).
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: WP6 contribution for CERIA is confirmed in wp_structure.json (Tier 4) but is not listed in roles.json (Tier 3). Tier 3 outranks Tier 4 in the authority hierarchy. The WP6 participation claim is therefore derived from a lower-authority source in conflict with a higher-authority source. The conflict between roles.json and wp_structure.json on this point is unresolved at the source level.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: BIIS (Breda Institute for Intelligent Systems, NL, HES): WP3 lead, deep learning/information retrieval/memory-augmented neural network expertise, pioneer in RAG, contributes to WP2/WP4/WP5/WP8
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/partners.json (BIIS: legal_name, country:NL, organisation_type:HES; description confirms deep learning, information retrieval, memory-augmented neural networks, pioneers in retrieval-augmented generation); docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/roles.json (BIIS: wp_lead:[WP3], wp_participant:[WP2,WP4,WP5,WP8] — exactly matches section claim)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: ISIA (Istituto Superiore di Ingegneria Avanzata, IT, HES): WP6 lead, operational pilot factory/digital twin/AI for manufacturing, contributes to WP1/WP8/WP9

Derivation: WP1 contribution present in wp_structure.json (Tier 4) but absent from docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/roles.json (Tier 3: ISIA wp_participant:[WP2,WP4,WP8,WP9], no WP1).
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: WP1 contribution for ISIA is confirmed in wp_structure.json (Tier 4) but absent from roles.json (Tier 3: lists WP2,WP4,WP8,WP9). Tier 3 outranks Tier 4. WP1 claim is supported only by the lower-authority Tier 4 source, in conflict with the higher-authority Tier 3 source.

claim_audit_results.flag_reason: WP1 contribution for NIHS is confirmed in wp_structure.json (Tier 4) but absent from roles.json (Tier 3: lists WP2,WP3,WP8). Tier 3 outranks Tier 4. claim_audit_results.claim_summary: BAL (Boreal AI Labs Oy, FI, PRC): WP9 lead, LLM fine-tuning/production-grade deployment/AI-on-demand platform integration per SR-10 and CC-05, contributes to WP2/WP3/WP5/WP6/WP7/WP8
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/partners.json (BAL: legal_name, country:FI, organisation_type:PRC; description confirms LLM fine-tuning and production-grade AI deployment); docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/roles.json (BAL: wp_lead:[WP9]; key_responsibilities include AI-on-demand platform integration); docs/tier2b_topic_and_call_sources/extracted/scope_requirements.json (SR-10 confirmed); docs/tier2b_topic_and_call_sources/extracted/call_constraints.json (CC-05 confirmed); docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase3_wp_design/wp_structure.json (partner_role_matrix[BAL] wps_as_contributor:[WP1,WP2,WP3,WP5,WP6,WP7,WP8]). Derivation: WP8 contribution present in wp_structure.json (Tier 4); docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/roles.json (Tier 3: BAL wp_participant:[WP2,WP3,WP4,WP5,WP6,WP7] — lists WP4 not WP8).
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: WP8 contribution for BAL is confirmed in wp_structure.json (Tier 4) but absent from roles.json (Tier 3: lists WP4 instead). Tier 3 outranks Tier 4. WP8 claim is supported only by the lower-authority Tier 4 source. Tier 3/Tier 4 conflict on WP8 vs WP4 participation is unresolved at the source level. SR-10 and CC-05 mandate for AI-on-demand platform confirmed directly from Tier 2B sources independent of this conflict.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: FIIT (Fundación Ibérica de Innovación Tecnológica, ES, REC): WP8 lead, AI evaluation framework/cross-demonstrator benchmarking/EDIH network dissemination/TEF coordination per CC-07, contributes to WP5/WP6/WP7/WP9
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/partners.json (FIIT: legal_name, country:ES, organisation_type:REC; description confirms AI evaluation frameworks, benchmarking, EDIH networks); docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/roles.json (FIIT: wp_lead:[WP8], wp_participant:[WP5,WP6,WP7,WP9], key_responsibilities confirm TEF coordination and EDIH dissemination); docs/tier2b_topic_and_call_sources/extracted/call_constraints.json (CC-07: 'Results may be validated in the Testing and Experiment Facilities'); docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase3_wp_design/wp_structure.json (WP8 lead_partner:FIIT confirmed)
